ground_truth.title: Cyber Monday Cybersecurity Deals | Save on CrowdStrike Falcon
ground_truth.main_content: Cyber Monday is over. Great security isn't. Missed out? Our world-class protection is always here. Check back soon for deals! Relentless protection, all year long. Why choose CrowdStrike? Reduce complexity. Install with ease. The CrowdStrike Falcon® platform is 100% cloud based and doesn’t require hardware, additional software, or configurations. Built to secure the AI era. AI is transforming business and arming adversaries. The Falcon platform is purpose-built to harness, operationalize, and scale agentic AI for cybersecurity. Customers trust CrowdStrike to protect what matters most. Compare Bundles. Falcon Go: Security essentials. $59.99 per device¹ / billed annually. Features: Next-gen antivirus, Device control, Mobile device protection, Express support. Falcon Pro: Enhanced protection. $99.99 per device / billed annually. Features: Next-gen antivirus, Device control, Mobile device protection, Firewall management, Express support. Falcon Enterprise: Advanced protection. $184.99 per device / billed annually. Features: Next-gen antivirus, Device control, Mobile device protection, Firewall management, Endpoint detection and response, Threat intelligence & hunting, Express support.
